title: iberis contracta subsp. vinetorum
intro: Iberis contracta subsp. vinetorum, also known as Rock Cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the cabbage family (Brassicaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iberis contracta subsp. vinetorum are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Rock Cress can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
